title: Package Downloading

actors.name: Developer
actors.description: Triggers install/update/remove operations; may configure download preferences or respond to interactive prompts about local changes

actors.name: PackageRepository
actors.description: External source providing package dist (ZIP/tar/HTTP) or source (Git/SVN/Hg) URLs via PackageInterface

use_cases.name: Install Package
use_cases.description: Resolves appropriate downloader for installed package and calls downloader->install()

use_cases.name: Update Package
use_cases.description: Compares initial/target downloader types; calls downloader->update() if same type, else remove+install

use_cases.name: Remove Package
use_cases.description: Resolves downloader for package and delegates to downloader->remove()

use_cases.name: Download Package
use_cases.description: Determines ordered source list (dist/source preference), iterates with source-fallback on RuntimeException

use_cases.name: Configure Download Preferences
use_cases.description: Sets global and per-package-pattern source/dist preferences; controls fallback behaviour

use_cases.name: Register Downloader
use_cases.description: Associates a named type (e.g. 'git', 'zip') with a concrete downloader instance

use_cases.name: Prepare Operation
use_cases.description: Pre-install/update step; risky work (local-change prompts) done here before actual operation

use_cases.name: Cleanup Failed Operation
use_cases.description: Undoes prepare/install changes on failure; always called regardless of success

use_cases.name: Download via Git
use_cases.description: Syncs VCS cache, git clone --no-checkout, set remotes, checkout to commit ref; stash/discard local changes interactively

use_cases.name: Download via ZIP/Archive
use_cases.description: Detects unzip/7z/ZipArchive availability; extracts archive; validates against zip-bomb ratio; falls back to ZipArchive on system-command failure

use_cases.name: Download via HTTP
use_cases.description: Downloads dist file over HTTP, verifies checksum, places in target dir; dist-source type

use_cases.name: Download via SVN
use_cases.description: SVN source checkout and update; inherits VcsDownloader lifecycle (cleanChanges, reapplyChanges)

use_cases.name: Handle Local Changes
use_cases.description: Interactive prompt for modified/unpushed changes before update/uninstall; y/n/s/d/v options; non-interactive uses discard-changes config

use_cases.name: Fallback to Alternative Source
use_cases.description: On recoverable RuntimeException, tries next available source (dist↔source) if sourceFallback=true

relationships: UC2 <<include>> UC3 (update may remove then reinstall when type changes)
UC4 <<extend>> UC14 (fallback to alternative source on download failure)
UC4 <<include>> UC9 or UC10 or UC11 or UC12 (based on resolved type: git/zip/http/svn)
UC9 <<extend>> UC13 (handle local git changes before update)
class_hierarchy: DownloaderInterface (interface): getInstallationSource, download, prepare, install, update, remove, cleanup
FileDownloader implements DownloaderInterface: dist source, HTTP download, checksum verification
ArchiveDownloader extends FileDownloader: abstract extract(package, file, path)
TarDownloader / PharDownloader / RarDownloader / GzipDownloader / XzDownloader extend ArchiveDownloader
VcsDownloader implements DownloaderInterface: source type, abstract doDownload/doInstall/doUpdate, cleanChanges/reapplyChanges
GitDownloader extends VcsDownloader + DvcsDownloaderInterface: git clone/fetch/checkout, cache support, stash/discard
DownloadManager: registry of DownloaderInterface by type, preference resolution, fallback logic
key_decisions: Preferred source order: preferSource flag → preferDist flag → per-package pattern (packagePreferences) → isDev() check (dev=source, stable=dist)
Source fallback: if download fails with RuntimeException and sourceFallback=true, retries with next source type
Metapackage: getDownloaderForPackage returns null, all operations are no-ops
Update type change: if downloader type changed between initial and target, performs remove then fresh install
ZipDownloader extraction priority: system unzip/7z first, PHP ZipArchive as fallback; zip-bomb detection (ratio >99% and >50MB)
